prompt_replacements.old:
Use value_source.kind=source_value when an existing source value is the group key.
Use value_source.kind=temporal_bucket with grain when timestamps are divided into calendar buckets.
Use value_source.kind=specified_question_inputs when concrete supplied inputs are the group members.
prompt_replacements.new:
Use value_source.kind=source_value when the group key comes from qualifying source rows, including rows restricted by supplied predicate values.
Use value_source.kind=temporal_bucket with grain when timestamps are divided into calendar buckets.

prompt_replacements.old: Each question_input must have one primary contract role: population predicate operand, specified group member, time constraint, computation operand, or result limit.
prompt_replacements.new: Each question_input must have one primary contract role: population predicate operand, time constraint, computation operand, or result limit.

prompt_replacements.old: Create question_inputs for concrete values supplied by the question or conversation resolution that a population predicate, specified group-member set, time constraint, compute expression, or result limit consumes.
prompt_replacements.new: Create question_inputs for concrete values supplied by the question or conversation resolution that a population predicate, time constraint, compute expression, or result limit consumes.

prompt_replacements.old:
Use GROUP_KEY exactly for concrete members of a specified_question_inputs group key; source_value and temporal_bucket group keys have no GROUP_KEY inputs.
A specified_question_inputs group key restricts the result-key domain to its GROUP_KEY inputs and groups by them; do not also create population predicates for those inputs.
Use POPULATION_TESTS when the input is an operand of one or more EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT membership tests.
prompt_replacements.new:
source_value and temporal_bucket group keys have no question-input owner.
Use POPULATION_TESTS when the input is an operand of one or more EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT membership tests.

prompt_replacements.old: GROUP_KEY, COMPUTE_EXPRESSION, and RESULT_LIMIT inputs are never membership-test operands.
prompt_replacements.new: COMPUTE_EXPRESSION and RESULT_LIMIT inputs are never membership-test operands.
